overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character descending through a graffiti-covered corridor into a sprawling urban underpass beneath highway overpasses. The environment features makeshift market stalls, construction barriers, scaffolding, and scattered NPCs, with dramatic sunlight streaming through gaps in the concrete structure. The clip ends as the player approaches a sleek black and red sports car parked in a sunlit section of the underpass.

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow concrete stairwell covered in colorful graffiti, moving toward a bright exit at the bottom

notable_agents.action: figure standing near the exit at the bottom of the stairs

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint tags and murals in teal, orange, and black
concrete wall with layered graffiti art and yellow text tags

long rectangular fluorescent light fixture mounted on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, enclosed stairwell descending into an urban underpass. The walls are densely covered in colorful graffiti and street art. Overhead fluorescent lights illuminate the concrete stairs as the camera moves steadily downward toward a bright exit where a distant figure stands.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban underpass with makeshift market stalls and hotel signage

events.description: exits the narrow graffiti stairwell into the wide open underpass beneath highway overpasses

agents.ego_description: walking through the underpass past market stalls and scattered pedestrians, approaching a neon hotel sign

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking near the hotel sign

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with support beams creating a cavernous ceiling
illuminated pink and white sign reading HOTEL with Japanese text below
makeshift tent with fabric canopy set up on the concrete floor
several vehicles parked along the left side of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast semi-covered urban underpass beneath massive concrete highway overpasses. Sunlight streams through gaps in the structure, illuminating a neon hotel sign and makeshift market stalls. The camera moves forward through scattered pedestrians and parked vehicles, transitioning from the enclosed stairwell to this open, layered urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction zone with scaffolding and barriers under overpass

temporary barriers with red and white horizontal stripes blocking off areas
large green industrial dumpster overflowing with trash bags

segments.scene_description: The underpass transitions into an active construction zone marked by orange scaffolding and red-and-white striped barriers. Sunlight creates dramatic beams across the concrete floor. The camera passes a green dumpster and construction materials while navigating around workers in high-visibility vests.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underpass corridor approaching exit with parked sports car

agents.ego_description: walking through a darker section of the underpass toward a brightly lit exit, approaching a parked sports car

entered.detail: sleek futuristic sports car with black body and red racing stripes parked in a sunbeam
smooth dark concrete walls with orange horizontal accent stripes

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a darker, narrower section of the underpass with smooth concrete walls. The camera approaches a bright exit where sunlight dramatically illuminates a sleek black and red sports car parked on the concrete. The environment shifts from cluttered construction to a cleaner, more open parking area as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent from a claustrophobic, graffiti-laden stairwell into a sprawling, sun-drenched urban underpass. It begins by moving steadily down concrete stairs under fluorescent lights, where colorful street art lines the walls, before emerging from the enclosure into a vast space beneath massive highway overpasses. As the camera advances, the environment shifts from a bustling market area with neon signs and pedestrians into an active construction zone filled with orange scaffolding, striped barriers, and dramatic beams of sunlight. The scene then narrows through a darker concrete corridor before finally opening into a bright, clean parking area where a sleek black and red sports car is bathed in light.
